chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6229 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.27669/2024 2. For orders on CMA No.27670/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No.27671/2024 4. For hearing of main case 13.12.2024 Mr. Abdul Ahad Khan, advocate for the petitioner Present petition assails orders dated 05.08.2024 and 25.11.2024, rendered by the official respondents; the same are reproduced herein below: ADMINISTRATIVE ORDER: All permission/NOC granted for Holding of Bachal Bazar in District Korangi Karachi, are hereby withdrawn / cancelled, with immediate effect, fill further orders. In case of Non Compliance Strict action will be taken against / Organizers of Bachat Bazar owners. This Issues with the approval of Competent Authority, Sd/- DISTRICT OFFICER DEPUTY COMMISSIONER DISTRICT KORANGI KARACHI “KARACHI METROPOLITAN CORPORATION ENTERPRISE & INVESTMENT PROMOΤΙΟΝ 1a Floor. Annexe Building, KMC Head Office, M.A. Jinnah Iload, Karachi No Sr.Dir/E&IP/KMC/7/34/2024 Dated: 25-11/2024 CANCELLATION ORDER: WHEREAS, this office issued temporary permission to Mr. Shahid Hussain and Muhammad Hammad Shahid vide office letter No. Sr. Dir/E&IP/KMC/1014/2024 dated 19-09-24 for organizing Friday Weekly Bachat Bazar at Akbari Eid Gha Ground Korangi No 5 1⁄2 District Korangi on the condition that, to obtain current NOCs from Concerned relevant department i.e NOC from Deputy Commission Korangi, NOC from Senior Superintendent of Police District Korangi for speculate, time but you failed to obtain NOCs which is mandatory for organizing any bachat bazar to this office the same above temporary permission in Favor of Mr.

Sr. Dir/E&IP/KMC/1014/2024 dated 19-09-24 for organizing Friday Weekly Bachat Bazar at Akbari Eid Gha Ground Korangi No 5 1⁄2 District Korangi on the condition that, to obtain current NOCs from Concerned relevant department i.e NOC from Deputy Commission Korangi, NOC from Senior Superintendent of Police District Korangi for speculate, time but you failed to obtain NOCs which is mandatory for organizing any bachat bazar to this office the same above temporary permission in Favor of Mr. Shahid Hussain and Muhammad Hammad Shahid for organizing Friday weekly bachat bazar at akbari Eid Gha Ground Korangi No 5 1⁄2 District Korangi, vide this office letter No.Sr.Dir/E&IP/KMC/1014/2024 dated 19/09/2024 is hereby withdrawn / cancelled with immediate effect. sd/- SENIOR DIRECTOR ENTERPRISE & INVESTMENT PROMOTION KARACHI METROPOLITAN CORPORATION Learned counsel was confronted to demonstrate any vested / Constitutional right to maintain this petition and / or relevant Bachat Bazar, however, he remained unable to do so. The only document relied upon was some temporary permission granted by the K.M.C; prima facie akin to a mere license. Counsel also failed to assist as to how a license right, if any, could be sought to be enforced in the writ jurisdiction. Counsel was also confronted with the question of how the determination sought could be undertaken without delving in to the realm of disputed factual controversies requiring inquiry and / or evidence1. Learned counsel remained unable to assist on either count. In view hereof, this petition is found to be prima facie misconceived, hence, while granting the application for urgency, the petition and the listed applications are hereby dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad 1 2016 CLC 1; 2015 PLC 45; 2015 CLD 257; 2011 SCMR 1990; 2001 SCMR 574; PLD 2001 Supreme Court 415.
